name: Chinese Spicy Chicken (Le Tze Gee)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bone and cube the chicken.
2. Mix sherry, soy sauce, and corn starch together.
3. Marinate the chicken in the cornstarch mixture for 15 minutes.
4. Heat oil in a pan.
5. Add the marinated chicken and cook, stirring occasionally, for 2 minutes.
6. Remove the chicken from the pan.
7. Add bamboo shoots, hoison sauce, scallions, ginger, and red pepper flakes to the pan.
8. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
9. Return the cooked chicken to the pan and serve.
